description: A dramatic painting of a massive conflagration engulfing a cityscape. Towering flames and billowing orange-red smoke fill nearly the entire canvas. At right, the silhouette of a church tower or Kremlin spire rises through the fire. Other architectural silhouettes — domes and towers — are barely visible through the inferno at left. The palette is dominated by intense oranges, reds, and blacks, creating an overwhelming impression of total destruction by fire.
